questions_processed.question: Rune Farming - locations for high runes
questions_processed.improvement_notes: Fixed intent classification for rune farming queries (was misclassified as build_advice due to class name), added High Rune Farming Locations mechanics fact, fixed MechanicsFactRecord and EvidenceSnippet schema to accept community_consensus evidence_source_type

review_instructions: Key changes: (1) Mechanics DB search now has stopword filtering and score-gap filtering - verify this doesn't hurt queries with short meaningful tokens. (2) Strategy cards now use content_tokens for scoring - may reduce hits for some queries. (3) Intent classifier has new _item_farming heuristic that overrides build_advice - verify this doesn't false-positive on actual build questions mentioning runes.
